mapper.select: SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, active_sessions AS activeSessions, waiting_sessions AS waitingSessions, idle_sessions AS idleSessions, idle_txn_sessions AS idleTxnSessions, avg_tx_duration_sec AS avgTxDurationSec, created_at AS createdAt FROM session_metrics_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, top_user_1 AS topUser1, top_user_1_sessions AS topUser1Sessions, top_user_2 AS topUser2, top_user_2_sessions AS topUser2Sessions, top_user_3 AS topUser3, top_user_3_sessions AS topUser3Sessions, top_user_4 AS topUser4, top_user_4_sessions AS topUser4Sessions, top_user_5 AS topUser5, top_user_5_sessions AS topUser5Sessions FROM session_metrics_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_id = #{databaseId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1;
